introSection: Achterbahn (English: Roller Coaster) is a steel kiddie indoor roller coaster currently located at Mc-Play Kinderland in Freudenberg, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble airplanes.

fullText:
Achterbahn (English: Roller Coaster) is a steel kiddie indoor roller coaster currently located at Mc-Play Kinderland in Freudenberg, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.



Blue track and unpainted supports.

The train is designed to resemble airplanes.
